name: Pin Asset
description: Snapshot a value into your own /a/ content-addressed namespace. The 'path' argument accepts any resolvable address (hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path). If the source is itself a CAS asset, both metadata and content are preserved; otherwise the resolved value is stored as inline metadata. Idempotent — pinning the same value twice produces the same hash. Returns the caller's DID URL for the pinned asset and its CAD3 hash.

path.description: Source address. Any resolvable form: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).
Caller's DID URL for the pinned asset (did:.../a/<hash>)

hash.description: Hex CAD3 hash of the pinned metadata — version identifier
